creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
After building for 24 hours, libreoffice fails on my poudriere machine with the following output at the end of the log:

clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/solver/unxfbsd.pro/inc/offapi'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /usr/local/include/libxml2'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /usr/local/include'
[build CXX] sd/source/ui/view/drviewsb.cxx
===>  Cleaning for libreoffice-4.0.5
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /usr/local/include'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/sd/source/ui/view/'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/solver/unxfbsd.pro/inc/external'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/solver/unxfbsd.pro/inc'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/solenv/inc'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /usr/local/include'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/config'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/sd/inc'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/sd/source/ui/inc'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/sd/source/ui/slidesorter/inc'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/workdir/unxfbsd.pro/SdiTarget/sd/sdi'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/solver/unxfbsd.pro/inc/udkapi'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/solver/unxfbsd.pro/inc/offapi'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /usr/local/include/libxml2'
clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /usr/local/include'
gmake[2]: *** No rule to make target `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/sd/source/ui/view/drviewsc.cxx', needed by `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/workdir/unxfbsd.pro/CxxObject/sd/source/ui/view/drviewsc.o'.  Stop.
====>> Leftover processes:
USER   PID %CPU %MEM    VSZ   RSS TT  STAT STARTED    TIME COMMAND
root 98651  0.0  0.0   6280     0  1  IW+J -       0:00.00 make -C /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice build
root 99236  0.0  0.0  14536     0  1  IW+J -       0:00.00 - (sh)
root 99239  0.0  0.0  15108     0  1  IW+J -       0:00.00 `-- gmake -f Makefile all
root 99245  0.0  0.0  15108     0  1  IW+J -       0:00.00   `-- gmake -r -f /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/Makefile.top all
root  1018  0.0  0.0  17480     0  1  IW+J -       0:00.00     `-- bash -c cd packimages && unset MAKEFLAGS && \\\n\011/wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/solenv/bin/build.pl -P1 --all -- -P1 && \\\n\011gmake -j 1 -rs
root  1038  0.0  0.0  44884     0  1  IW+J -       0:00.00       `-- perl -S /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/solenv/bin/build.pl -P1 --all -- -P1 (perl5.14.4)
root 13305  0.0  0.0  44884     0  1  IW+J -       0:00.00         `-- perl -S /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-4.0.5.2/solenv/bin/build.pl -P1 --all -- -P1 (perl5.14.4)
root 13307 67.7  1.6 134020 67692  1  R+J  Wed04AM 3:24.65           `-- gmake -f Makefile -j1 -rs all slowcheck gb_PARTIALBUILD=T
Killed
build of /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice ended at Thu Oct 17 00:07:59 EDT 2013

How-To-Repeat: Build libreoffice in poudriere 9.2 amd64 jail.
